title: Langre
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Langre''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bike [[Swoop gang/Legends|gang]] member who lived on [[Pembric II]] as of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He attempted to dissuade [[Talon Karrde]] from entering the [[ThrusterBurn Tapcafe]] while he was searching for [[Jorj Car'das]] in the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]], claiming that the cantina in question was in-use, presumably for a swoop gang meeting. When Karrde refused to be persuaded to leave, Langre attempted to run over his bodyguard, [[Shada D'ukal]], with his bike, only to be thrown from it, leaving his riderless bike to wreck itself on a nearby wall.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
